project_type: VPN admin panel - Vue 3 + TypeScript + Pinia frontend with Go backend
build_system: Vite for frontend, go build for backend. No monorepo tool - just npm in each web dir.
test_framework: vitest for admin/shared frontend, go test for backend
build_command: cd panel/web/admin && npm install && npm run build && cd ../../web/portal && npm install && npm run build
test_command: cd panel/web/admin && npx vitest run; cd ../../web/shared && npx vitest run
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm run build in panel/web/admin and panel/web/portal (vue-tsc + vite build). 2. Run vitest in panel/web/admin and panel/web/shared. 3. Run go build ./... from panel/ root.
setup_instructions: cd /projects/sandbox/panel/panel/web/admin && npm install; cd ../portal && npm install; cd ../shared && npm install
environment_constraints: No Docker daemon available. Frontend validation via TypeScript type-checking (vue-tsc --noEmit) and vite build. Go build from panel/ root.
contribution_requirements: Follow DESIGN_SYSTEM.md conventions. Use shared KorisUI components (@koris/ui). Use useI18n composable from @koris/composables. Components use scoped CSS with CSS custom properties.
key_patterns: Stores use Pinia composition API style. Views import from '@koris/ui/Component.vue'. Forms use KFormField + KInput/KSelect pattern. API calls use useApi composable with get/post/patch/del methods. i18n uses shared useI18n composable with registerMessages. KDrawer exists and is fully implemented with focus trap, slide animation, Teleport to body.
directory_structure: panel/web/admin/src/ - admin frontend (views, stores, layouts, components). panel/web/portal/src/ - customer portal (views, stores, layouts, components). panel/web/shared/ - shared components (@koris/ui) and composables (@koris/composables). panel/internal/api/ - Go backend API handlers.
